title: Hornet Removal in University Heights, Bronx | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal in University Heights, Bronx. Safe nest elimination from homes, businesses & properties. Licensed experts. Call for fast service: $350-$550.
intro: University Heights residents facing hornet infestations need swift, professional intervention to protect their families and properties. Our licensed hornet removal specialists serve the entire University Heights neighborhood, from pre-war apartment buildings to single-family homes near Hall of Fame Terrace. We provide safe, effective hornet nest elimination with pricing between $350 and $550 depending on nest size and location.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving University Heights and the greater Bronx for years with certified technicians who understand the unique pest challenges of this historic neighborhood. Our same-day or next-day service, combined with our thorough inspection and guaranteed results, makes us the trusted choice for hornet removal in University Heights.
localContext: University Heights' mix of classic brick apartment complexes, tree-lined streets near Bronx Community College, and proximity to University Woods creates ideal conditions for hornet nesting in eaves, porches, and tree branches. The neighborhood's older architecture often provides hidden spaces where hornets establish large colonies, requiring professional expertise for safe removal.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in University Heights?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day hornet removal service throughout University Heights. Once you call, we'll dispatch a licensed technician to assess the nest location and safely eliminate the hornets, typically completing the job within one visit. Emergency services are available for nests near entryways or high-traffic areas.

faqs.question: What factors affect the cost of hornet removal in University Heights?
faqs.answer: Our $350-$550 pricing range depends on nest size, location accessibility, and colony activity level. Ground-level nests are typically at the lower end, while nests in high eaves, chimneys, or wall voids requiring specialized equipment cost more. We provide a firm quote after our initial inspection with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my University Heights apartment building or home?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our certified technicians use EPA-approved treatments and follow strict safety protocols to protect residents, pets, and the environment. We recommend keeping people and pets indoors during treatment, and the area is typically safe within a few hours. We handle everything from initial treatment to nest removal and disposal.

faqs.question: How can I prevent hornets from returning to my University Heights property?
faqs.answer: After removal, we inspect your property for potential nesting sites and provide recommendations such as sealing eaves, repairing soffits, and trimming vegetation away from structures. We also offer seasonal prevention treatments and can schedule follow-up inspections to ensure hornets don't rebuild in the area.
